progress_notes.resident_status: Resident is clinically stable and continuing to adjust to the facility milieu following readmission. She appears more settled than initial days but continues to present with depressed mood.
progress_notes.observed_behaviors: Resident was observed sitting alone in the common area between groups, looking out the window. She attended all scheduled groups but was quiet and did not volunteer to share.
progress_notes.mood_affect: Resident reported mood as "tired." Affect was blunted with occasional tearfulness noted during process group when peers discussed loss.
progress_notes.activity_participation: Attended morning CBT group and psychoeducation group on relapse triggers. Minimal verbal participation but appeared to be listening and took notes.
progress_notes.staff_interactions: Resident was pleasant but brief when approached by staff. Accepted check-in from BHT and answered questions appropriately.
progress_notes.peer_interactions: Limited peer interaction observed. Resident sat apart from others during meals and did not initiate conversation. Responded politely when addressed by peers.
progress_notes.medication_compliance: AM medications administered per MAR without issue. Resident accepted MAT medication and psychiatric medications as prescribed.
progress_notes.hygiene_adls: Resident completed morning hygiene independently. Room was tidy during bed check. Dressed appropriately for the day.
progress_notes.meals_appetite: Resident ate approximately 50% of breakfast and 75% of lunch. Stated she "wasn't very hungry" but accepted encouragement to eat.
progress_notes.sleep_pattern: Resident reported sleeping approximately 4 hours with multiple awakenings. States she had nightmares but declined to discuss content.
progress_notes.staff_interventions: BHT provided supportive check-in after resident appeared tearful following group. Offered 1:1 time which resident declined. Reminded of coping skills from treatment plan.
progress_notes.resident_response: Resident thanked staff for checking in but stated she wanted to be alone. Agreed to approach staff if needed.
progress_notes.additional_notes: Continue monitoring mood and sleep. Resident may benefit from encouragement to engage more with peers.

progress_notes.resident_status: Resident remains stable with no acute concerns. Appeared calmer during evening hours.
progress_notes.observed_behaviors: Resident was observed reading in her room after dinner. She came to the common area briefly for evening snack and returned to her room before lights out.
progress_notes.mood_affect: Resident reported mood as "okay." Affect was congruent and slightly brighter than earlier in the day.
progress_notes.activity_participation: N/A - No scheduled programming during PM shift.
progress_notes.staff_interactions: Resident was cooperative during evening med pass and bed checks. Brief but appropriate interactions.
progress_notes.peer_interactions: Minimal. Resident said goodnight to one peer before returning to her room.
progress_notes.medication_compliance: Evening medications administered per MAR without issue. Resident accepted all medications including sleep aid as prescribed.
progress_notes.hygiene_adls: Resident completed evening hygiene routine independently.
progress_notes.meals_appetite: Resident accepted evening snack.
progress_notes.sleep_pattern: Resident was observed asleep during 11 PM and 2 AM bed checks. Appeared to be sleeping peacefully with no restlessness noted. Awake and in bed during 5 AM check.
progress_notes.staff_interventions: Routine monitoring and support.
progress_notes.resident_response: Cooperative with evening routine.

progress_notes.resident_status: Resident presents with improved mood compared to previous day. More engaged during morning routine and groups.
progress_notes.observed_behaviors: Resident was observed participating in morning meditation group and made eye contact with facilitator. She shared briefly during process group about her motivation for treatment.
progress_notes.mood_affect: Resident reported mood as "better today." Affect was full range with appropriate smiling when interacting with a peer.
progress_notes.activity_participation: Attended all scheduled groups including morning meditation, CBT skills group, and AA meeting. Shared briefly during AA meeting about wanting to stay sober for her children.
progress_notes.staff_interactions: Resident initiated brief conversation with BHT about the day's schedule. Cooperative and engaged during interactions.
progress_notes.peer_interactions: Resident was observed having a short conversation with another female resident during lunch. Appeared comfortable and smiled during the exchange.
progress_notes.medication_compliance: AM medications administered per MAR without issue. No concerns with compliance.
progress_notes.hygiene_adls: Independent with all ADLs. Room maintained appropriately.
progress_notes.meals_appetite: Resident ate approximately 75% of breakfast and all of lunch. Appetite appears improved.
progress_notes.sleep_pattern: Resident reported sleeping approximately 5-6 hours with one awakening. States the sleep medication is helping.
progress_notes.staff_interventions: Provided positive reinforcement for group participation. Encouraged continued engagement with peers.
progress_notes.resident_response: Resident smiled and stated she is "trying." Receptive to encouragement.
progress_notes.additional_notes: Positive shift in engagement noted. Continue to support peer connections.

progress_notes.resident_status: Resident stable. Evening passed without incident.
progress_notes.observed_behaviors: Resident watched TV in the common area with two peers before retiring to her room. Laughed appropriately at the program.
progress_notes.mood_affect: Mood appears stable. Affect congruent.
progress_notes.activity_participation: N/A
progress_notes.staff_interactions: Cooperative with staff during evening routine.
progress_notes.peer_interactions: Sat with peers during evening leisure time. Minimal conversation but appeared comfortable in group setting.
progress_notes.medication_compliance: Evening medications administered without issue.
progress_notes.meals_appetite: Accepted evening snack.
progress_notes.sleep_pattern: Resident observed asleep during 11 PM and 2 AM checks. Brief awakening noted at 4 AM check; resident was awake but resting quietly in bed. Asleep again at 5 AM check.
progress_notes.staff_interventions: Routine monitoring.
progress_notes.resident_response: No concerns.

progress_notes.resident_status: Resident presents with slightly lower mood today. Reports feeling "sad" this morning but denies SI/HI. States anniversary of her child's death is approaching.
progress_notes.observed_behaviors: Resident was tearful during morning check-in. Attended groups but was more withdrawn than previous day. Was observed wiping eyes during trauma psychoeducation group.
progress_notes.mood_affect: Resident reported mood as "sad." Affect was constricted with tearfulness. Able to identify reason for mood change.
progress_notes.activity_participation: Attended morning groups but participation was minimal. Left trauma psychoeducation group briefly to compose herself in the hallway. Returned after 5 minutes with staff support.
progress_notes.staff_interactions: Resident engaged in supportive 1:1 with BHT after leaving group. Discussed upcoming anniversary and identified coping strategies. Agreed to speak with therapist.
progress_notes.peer_interactions: Limited interaction. One peer checked on her after group and resident accepted the support briefly.
progress_notes.medication_compliance: AM medications administered per MAR without issue.
progress_notes.hygiene_adls: Completed morning hygiene independently. Room tidy.
progress_notes.meals_appetite: Appetite decreased. Ate approximately 25% of breakfast. Ate more at lunch (approximately 60%) after encouragement.
progress_notes.sleep_pattern: Resident reported poor sleep (approximately 3-4 hours) with nightmares related to her deceased child.
progress_notes.staff_interventions: Provided 1:1 supportive intervention. Reviewed grounding techniques. Notified clinical team of upcoming trauma anniversary and current presentation. Encouraged use of PRN if needed.
progress_notes.resident_response: Resident was receptive to support. Utilized deep breathing with staff. Stated she appreciated staff checking on her. Declined PRN stating she wants to "feel her feelings."
progress_notes.notable_events: Resident experienced increased emotional distress related to upcoming anniversary of child's death. Managed with supportive intervention and coping skills. Safety confirmed; no SI/HI.
progress_notes.additional_notes: Clinical team notified. Individual therapy session scheduled for this afternoon to process grief. Continue close monitoring of mood.

progress_notes.resident_status: Resident appears calmer following individual therapy session this afternoon. Mood remains subdued but stable.
progress_notes.observed_behaviors: Resident spent most of evening in her room journaling. Came out briefly for snack and medication.
progress_notes.mood_affect: Resident reported feeling "a little better" after therapy. Affect subdued but less tearful than earlier.
progress_notes.activity_participation: N/A
progress_notes.staff_interactions: Brief interactions. Resident thanked night staff for giving her space while remaining available.
progress_notes.peer_interactions: Minimal. Resident preferred solitude this evening.
progress_notes.medication_compliance: Evening medications administered without issue. Accepted sleep medication.
progress_notes.meals_appetite: Accepted evening snack but ate minimally.
progress_notes.sleep_pattern: Resident had difficulty falling asleep initially. Observed awake at 11 PM check but resting in bed. Asleep at 1 AM, 3 AM, and 5 AM checks. No restlessness noted once asleep.
progress_notes.staff_interventions: Routine monitoring with slightly increased check-ins given earlier distress.
progress_notes.resident_response: Cooperative. Expressed appreciation for staff support.
progress_notes.additional_notes: Continue monitoring mood. Resident processing grief appropriately with clinical support.

progress_notes.resident_status: Resident is stable and continuing to make gradual progress in treatment. Presenting with anxious mood but engaging more consistently in programming.
progress_notes.observed_behaviors: Resident attended all groups and was observed taking notes. Made brief eye contact with facilitator during CBT group. Fidgeted with her hands during discussions but remained seated and attentive.
progress_notes.mood_affect: Resident reported mood as "nervous." Affect was constricted but slightly brighter than previous weeks.
progress_notes.activity_participation: Attended CBT group, relapse prevention group, and life skills group. Shared one brief comment during relapse prevention when asked directly about triggers.
progress_notes.staff_interactions: Resident was cooperative but quiet during interactions. Nodded appropriately when given information. Initiated one brief question about the afternoon schedule.
progress_notes.peer_interactions: Limited but improving. Resident sat near one peer during lunch and exchanged a few words about the meal.
progress_notes.medication_compliance: AM medications administered per MAR without issue. Resident accepted all medications including morning antidepressant and anti-craving medication as prescribed.
progress_notes.hygiene_adls: Independent with hygiene. Room clean and organized.
progress_notes.meals_appetite: Ate approximately 75% of breakfast and 80% of lunch. Appetite appears stable.
progress_notes.sleep_pattern: Resident reported sleeping approximately 6 hours. Stated sleep medication is helping but still wakes up once during the night.
progress_notes.staff_interventions: Provided encouragement for group participation. Offered positive reinforcement for sharing during group.
progress_notes.resident_response: Resident gave a small smile in response to praise. Did not verbally respond but appeared receptive.
progress_notes.additional_notes: Continue encouraging verbal participation in groups. Resident responding well to gentle, non-pressuring approach.

progress_notes.resident_status: Resident stable. Quiet evening.
progress_notes.observed_behaviors: Resident was observed coloring in the common area during leisure time. Appeared calm and focused on activity.
progress_notes.mood_affect: Mood appeared calm. Affect appropriate to activity.
progress_notes.activity_participation: N/A - Engaged in coloring during free time.
progress_notes.staff_interactions: Cooperative during med pass. Brief and appropriate.
progress_notes.peer_interactions: Sat near peers during leisure time but minimal verbal interaction. Appeared comfortable.
progress_notes.medication_compliance: Evening medications administered without issue. Accepted PRN for anxiety and sleep medication as prescribed.
progress_notes.meals_appetite: Accepted evening snack.
progress_notes.sleep_pattern: Resident observed asleep during all overnight bed checks. No restlessness or awakenings noted.
progress_notes.staff_interventions: Routine monitoring.
progress_notes.resident_response: Cooperative.

progress_notes.resident_status: Resident stable with slightly elevated anxiety this morning. Reports feeling worried but unable to identify specific cause.
progress_notes.observed_behaviors: Resident was observed pacing briefly in the hallway before morning group. Attended groups but appeared more tense, crossing arms and looking down frequently.
progress_notes.mood_affect: Resident reported mood as "anxious." Affect was constricted with noticeable tension in posture and voice.
progress_notes.activity_participation: Attended all scheduled groups but did not participate verbally. Left DBT group once to use the restroom. Returned promptly.
progress_notes.staff_interactions: Resident approached BHT after lunch to request PRN for anxiety. Communicated need appropriately.
progress_notes.peer_interactions: Minimal interaction. Sat alone at breakfast. One peer attempted to engage her but resident gave brief one-word responses.
progress_notes.medication_compliance: AM medications administered without issue. PRN anxiety medication administered at 1145 per resident request and MAR parameters.
progress_notes.meals_appetite: Appetite slightly decreased. Ate approximately 50% of breakfast and 60% of lunch.
progress_notes.sleep_pattern: Resident reported sleeping approximately 5 hours with difficulty falling asleep. States racing thoughts kept her awake.
progress_notes.staff_interventions: Provided supportive check-in when resident appeared anxious. Administered PRN medication as requested. Reviewed grounding techniques and encouraged use of coping skills.
progress_notes.resident_response: Resident utilized deep breathing with staff. Reported feeling "a little better" 30 minutes after PRN. Thanked staff quietly.
progress_notes.additional_notes: Monitor for continued anxiety. May benefit from discussing with psychiatrist at next appointment.

progress_notes.resident_status: Resident stable. Anxiety appears decreased from earlier in the day.
progress_notes.observed_behaviors: Resident was observed reading in her room during evening free time. Calm and relaxed demeanor.
progress_notes.mood_affect: Mood appears calmer. Resident reported anxiety is "better now."
progress_notes.activity_participation: N/A
progress_notes.staff_interactions: Cooperative and pleasant during evening check-in.
progress_notes.peer_interactions: N/A - Preferred to spend time alone in room.
progress_notes.medication_compliance: Evening medications administered without issue.
progress_notes.meals_appetite: Accepted evening snack and ate most of it.
progress_notes.sleep_pattern: Resident asleep during 11 PM check. Brief awakening at 2 AM (observed sitting up in bed) but fell back asleep by next check. Asleep for remainder of night.
progress_notes.staff_interventions: Routine monitoring.
progress_notes.resident_response: No concerns.

progress_notes.resident_status: Resident presents with improved mood compared to yesterday. Appears more relaxed and engaged.
progress_notes.observed_behaviors: Resident was observed smiling during morning meditation group. Participated in art therapy by creating a collage about her recovery goals. Showed her work to staff when asked.
progress_notes.mood_affect: Resident reported mood as "good today." Affect was brighter with appropriate range and rare smile observed.
progress_notes.activity_participation: Attended morning meditation, art therapy, and NA meeting. Actively participated in art therapy and shared her collage with the group when encouraged. Said a few words about wanting to stay sober for her nieces and nephews.
progress_notes.staff_interactions: Resident initiated conversation with BHT about her artwork. More verbal than typical. Eye contact improved.
progress_notes.peer_interactions: Sat with two peers during lunch. Observed nodding and responding to conversation. Appeared more comfortable in social setting.
progress_notes.medication_compliance: AM medications administered per MAR without issue. Did not request PRN today.
progress_notes.meals_appetite: Appetite improved. Ate approximately 80% of breakfast and 90% of lunch.
progress_notes.sleep_pattern: Resident reported sleeping approximately 7 hours with no awakenings. Stated she felt rested.
progress_notes.staff_interventions: Provided positive reinforcement for increased participation and peer engagement.
progress_notes.resident_response: Resident smiled and said "thanks." Appeared pleased with positive feedback.
progress_notes.additional_notes: Significant progress in engagement and affect noted. Continue positive reinforcement.

progress_notes.resident_status: Resident stable. Pleasant evening.
progress_notes.observed_behaviors: Resident watched a movie with peers in the common area. Laughed at appropriate moments and appeared to enjoy the social activity.
progress_notes.mood_affect: Mood stable. Affect appropriate and calm.
progress_notes.activity_participation: N/A - Participated in leisure activity with peers.
progress_notes.staff_interactions: Cooperative. Said "goodnight" to staff before going to her room.
progress_notes.peer_interactions: Sat with group during movie night. Brief verbal exchanges with peers.
progress_notes.medication_compliance: Evening medications administered without issue.
progress_notes.meals_appetite: Accepted evening snack.
progress_notes.sleep_pattern: Resident observed asleep during all overnight checks. Sleeping peacefully with no disturbances noted.
progress_notes.staff_interventions: Routine monitoring and support.
progress_notes.resident_response: Cooperative.

progress_notes.resident_status: Resident is in early treatment (Day 4) and continuing to adjust to the structured environment. Appears somewhat disoriented to routine but cooperative with redirection.
progress_notes.observed_behaviors: Resident was observed looking confused about group schedule and needed staff assistance locating the correct room. Attended groups but appeared fatigued and had difficulty maintaining focus.
progress_notes.mood_affect: Resident reported mood as "okay I guess." Affect was flat with limited emotional expression.
progress_notes.activity_participation: Attended orientation group and relapse prevention psychoeducation. Participation was minimal. Appeared to be listening but did not engage verbally.
progress_notes.staff_interactions: Resident was cooperative with staff direction. Asked several questions about facility rules and daily schedule.
progress_notes.peer_interactions: Limited. Resident sat alone and did not initiate conversation with peers. Responded briefly when greeted by another resident.
progress_notes.medication_compliance: N/A - no current medications. Resident continues to decline psychiatric medications. Staff educated on benefits and resident stated she "wants to try without them first."
progress_notes.hygiene_adls: Needed reminders for morning hygiene. Completed tasks after prompting. Room was somewhat disorganized.
progress_notes.meals_appetite: Ate approximately 60% of breakfast and 70% of lunch. Appetite fair.
progress_notes.sleep_pattern: Resident reported sleeping approximately 4 hours with frequent awakenings. States she is "not used to sleeping in a new place."
progress_notes.staff_interventions: Provided orientation support and redirection to groups. Educated on benefits of medication with non-judgmental approach. Offered sleep hygiene tips.
progress_notes.resident_response: Resident was receptive to orientation support. Declined medication recommendation but stated she would "think about it."
progress_notes.additional_notes: Continue supporting adjustment to milieu. Monitor sleep and revisit medication discussion as appropriate.

progress_notes.resident_status: Resident stable. Adjusting to evening routine.
progress_notes.observed_behaviors: Resident spent evening in common area but remained on the periphery of group activities. Observed yawning frequently.
progress_notes.mood_affect: Mood subdued. Affect flat.
progress_notes.activity_participation: N/A
progress_notes.staff_interactions: Cooperative during evening routine. Asked when she could make a phone call.
progress_notes.peer_interactions: Minimal. Observed watching peers interact but not participating.
progress_notes.medication_compliance: N/A - no current medications.
progress_notes.meals_appetite: Accepted evening snack.
progress_notes.sleep_pattern: Resident had difficulty falling asleep. Observed awake at 11 PM and 1 AM checks. Asleep by 3 AM check. Some restlessness noted during 5 AM check.
progress_notes.staff_interventions: Offered warm milk and reviewed relaxation techniques for sleep.
progress_notes.resident_response: Accepted warm milk. Attempted relaxation technique with limited success.
progress_notes.additional_notes: Sleep continues to be problematic. Encourage reconsideration of sleep medication at next clinical meeting.

progress_notes.resident_status: Resident presents fatigued due to poor sleep. More irritable than previous day. Cooperative but requires more prompting.
progress_notes.observed_behaviors: Resident was slow to get out of bed and needed multiple prompts to attend morning group. Appeared drowsy during psychoeducation group. At one point, closed eyes briefly before staff prompted her to sit up.
progress_notes.mood_affect: Resident reported mood as "tired and frustrated." Affect was irritable with sighing noted when given directions.
progress_notes.activity_participation: Attended CBT group and process group with significant prompting. Participation minimal. Made one brief comment about being "too tired to think."
progress_notes.staff_interactions: Resident was somewhat short with staff when prompted to attend groups. Apologized later and stated she was just tired.
progress_notes.peer_interactions: Avoided peer interaction. Sat alone and declined invitation to sit with group at lunch.
progress_notes.medication_compliance: N/A - no current medications. Resident agreed to discuss sleep medication with nurse practitioner today.
progress_notes.hygiene_adls: Needed prompting for hygiene. Completed with assistance. Room disorganized.
progress_notes.meals_appetite: Appetite decreased. Ate approximately 40% of breakfast, 50% of lunch.
progress_notes.sleep_pattern: Resident reported sleeping only 2-3 hours total. Reports racing thoughts and difficulty getting comfortable.
progress_notes.staff_interventions: Provided multiple prompts and encouragement. De-escalated irritability with calm, supportive approach. Coordinated with clinical team regarding medication discussion.
progress_notes.resident_response: Resident responded to calm approach and apologized for irritability. Agreed to meet with prescriber about sleep medication.
progress_notes.notable_events: Resident agreed to trial sleep medication after several nights of poor sleep. Prescriber appointment scheduled for this afternoon.
progress_notes.additional_notes: Sleep deprivation impacting functioning and mood. Monitor response to medication if initiated today.

progress_notes.resident_status: Resident stable. Met with prescriber this afternoon and agreed to start sleep medication tonight.
progress_notes.observed_behaviors: Resident appeared slightly more relaxed after prescriber appointment. Sat in common area briefly before dinner.
progress_notes.mood_affect: Mood still tired but less irritable than morning.
progress_notes.activity_participation: N/A
progress_notes.staff_interactions: Cooperative. Thanked staff for help arranging prescriber meeting.
progress_notes.peer_interactions: Brief exchange with one peer at dinner.
progress_notes.medication_compliance: Evening sleep medication administered for first time per new orders. Resident accepted willingly.
progress_notes.hygiene_adls: Completed evening hygiene with one reminder.
progress_notes.meals_appetite: Accepted dinner and evening snack. Appetite improved slightly.
progress_notes.sleep_pattern: Resident fell asleep within 45 minutes of sleep medication administration (11 PM check - asleep). Remained asleep during 1 AM, 3 AM checks. Observed awake but resting at 5 AM check.
progress_notes.staff_interventions: Monitored response to new sleep medication.
progress_notes.resident_response: Resident reported feeling drowsy after medication. Expressed hope that it will help her sleep better.
progress_notes.notable_events: Sleep medication initiated per prescriber orders.
progress_notes.additional_notes: Monitor response to new medication.

progress_notes.resident_status: Resident presents with improved mood following better sleep. More alert and cooperative than previous days.
progress_notes.observed_behaviors: Resident was up on time for morning group without prompting. Made eye contact with facilitator and appeared more attentive during groups.
progress_notes.mood_affect: Resident reported mood as "better - I actually slept." Affect was brighter with appropriate range.
progress_notes.activity_participation: Attended morning psychoeducation and process group. Participated briefly in process group by sharing that she is starting to feel more hopeful about treatment.
progress_notes.staff_interactions: Resident was friendly with staff. Thanked BHT for encouraging her to try medication.
progress_notes.peer_interactions: Sat with peers at breakfast. Had brief conversation about the weather. Smiled appropriately during interaction.
progress_notes.medication_compliance: N/A for AM - no AM medications currently ordered. Resident reported feeling positive effects from last night's sleep medication.
progress_notes.hygiene_adls: Completed morning hygiene independently without prompting. Room tidier than previous days.
progress_notes.meals_appetite: Appetite improved. Ate approximately 75% of breakfast and 85% of lunch.
progress_notes.sleep_pattern: Resident reported sleeping approximately 6 hours - "the best sleep I've had in weeks." One brief awakening but fell back asleep easily.
progress_notes.staff_interventions: Provided positive reinforcement for improvements. Encouraged continued medication compliance and group engagement.
progress_notes.resident_response: Resident was receptive and appeared motivated. Stated she wants to "give this a real try."
progress_notes.additional_notes: Marked improvement in presentation following sleep medication. Continue current plan.

progress_notes.resident_status: Resident stable with continued improvement in overall presentation.
progress_notes.observed_behaviors: Resident participated in evening leisure activity (card game) with two peers. Appeared engaged and smiled several times.
progress_notes.mood_affect: Mood stable and calm.
progress_notes.activity_participation: N/A - Engaged in recreational activity with peers.
progress_notes.staff_interactions: Cooperative and friendly.
progress_notes.peer_interactions: Played cards with two peers. Conversation was light and appropriate.
progress_notes.medication_compliance: Evening sleep medication administered per MAR. Resident accepted willingly.
progress_notes.meals_appetite: Accepted evening snack.
progress_notes.sleep_pattern: Resident asleep during 11 PM check. Asleep and sleeping peacefully through all overnight checks.
progress_notes.staff_interventions: Routine monitoring and support.
progress_notes.resident_response: Cooperative.

progress_notes.resident_status: Resident is clinically stable and actively engaged in programming. Presents with outwardly positive demeanor though underlying depression symptoms noted periodically.
progress_notes.observed_behaviors: Resident was talkative during morning groups and made several comments during relapse prevention discussion. Observed pacing during breaks with restless energy. Tapped foot frequently while seated.
progress_notes.mood_affect: Resident reported mood as "good." Affect was full range though speech was rapid at times. Underlying tension noted despite cheerful presentation.
progress_notes.activity_participation: Attended all scheduled groups including CBT, relapse prevention, and 12-step meeting. Active verbal participation. Shared about his motivation to stay sober for his girlfriend during AA meeting.
progress_notes.staff_interactions: Resident was friendly and talkative with staff. Asked multiple questions about discharge timeline and housing options.
progress_notes.peer_interactions: Socialized with male peers during breaks. Observed joking and laughing with group. Takes on informal peer support role at times.
progress_notes.medication_compliance: N/A - no current medications.
progress_notes.hygiene_adls: Independent with all ADLs. Room clean.
progress_notes.meals_appetite: Good appetite. Ate most of breakfast and all of lunch. Requested seconds at lunch.
progress_notes.sleep_pattern: Resident reported sleeping approximately 5-6 hours. States he woke up early feeling restless.
progress_notes.staff_interventions: Provided reality-testing regarding discharge timeline (reminded of 90-day program commitment). Encouraged focus on current treatment goals rather than rushing ahead.
progress_notes.resident_response: Resident agreed to focus on present goals but appeared slightly frustrated with timeline reminder. Stated he "just wants to get back to normal life."
progress_notes.additional_notes: Continue monitoring for restlessness and underlying mood symptoms. Address motivation for rushing through treatment in therapy.

progress_notes.resident_status: Resident stable. Active during evening hours.
progress_notes.observed_behaviors: Resident was observed exercising in the outdoor area during free time. Later played cards with peers in common area.
progress_notes.mood_affect: Mood appeared stable. Energy level remains elevated but within normal limits.
progress_notes.activity_participation: N/A - Engaged in physical activity and leisure with peers.
progress_notes.staff_interactions: Cooperative. Chatted briefly with night staff about his plans after discharge.
progress_notes.peer_interactions: Active socialization with multiple peers.
progress_notes.medication_compliance: N/A - no current medications.
progress_notes.meals_appetite: Accepted evening snack.
progress_notes.sleep_pattern: Resident observed awake at 11 PM check, stated he "couldn't sleep yet." Asleep by 1 AM check. Remained asleep through 3 AM and 5 AM checks.
progress_notes.staff_interventions: Encouraged resident to try relaxation techniques to aid sleep.
progress_notes.resident_response: Resident agreed to try but stated he "has always had trouble winding down."

progress_notes.resident_status: Resident stable though presenting with slightly lower mood today. Less talkative than typical in morning groups.
progress_notes.observed_behaviors: Resident was quieter than usual during morning CBT group. Observed staring out the window during break instead of socializing. When approached, stated he was "just thinking."
progress_notes.mood_affect: Resident reported mood as "okay." Affect was more subdued than typical with less spontaneous smiling.
progress_notes.activity_participation: Attended all groups but participation decreased. Made one comment during relapse prevention but otherwise remained quiet.
progress_notes.staff_interactions: Resident was cooperative but less talkative. When asked if he was okay, stated he missed his girlfriend and was feeling "down about being here."
progress_notes.peer_interactions: Less social than typical. Sat with peers at lunch but did not engage in conversation as much.
progress_notes.medication_compliance: N/A - no current medications.
progress_notes.meals_appetite: Appetite slightly decreased. Ate approximately 60% of breakfast and 70% of lunch.
progress_notes.sleep_pattern: Resident reported sleeping approximately 4-5 hours with difficulty falling asleep. Reports thinking about his life situation.
progress_notes.staff_interventions: Provided supportive check-in. Validated feelings of missing girlfriend and frustration with treatment timeline. Encouraged him to discuss these feelings in individual therapy.
progress_notes.resident_response: Resident appreciated validation. Stated he knows he needs to be here but "it's hard sometimes." Agreed to bring up feelings in therapy.
progress_notes.additional_notes: Depression symptoms more visible today when cheerful facade drops. Important to address in therapy.

progress_notes.resident_status: Resident stable. Mood improved after approved phone call with girlfriend.
progress_notes.observed_behaviors: Resident appeared brighter after phone call. Rejoined peers for evening leisure activities.
progress_notes.mood_affect: Mood improved. Stated the call "really helped."
progress_notes.activity_participation: N/A
progress_notes.staff_interactions: Thanked staff for facilitating phone call.
progress_notes.peer_interactions: Resumed typical social interaction with peers.
progress_notes.medication_compliance: N/A - no current medications.
progress_notes.meals_appetite: Accepted evening snack.
progress_notes.sleep_pattern: Resident asleep by 11 PM check. Asleep through all checks with no disturbances.
progress_notes.staff_interventions: Facilitated approved phone call with girlfriend.
progress_notes.resident_response: Positive response to support.
progress_notes.notable_events: Resident had approved phone call with girlfriend which improved mood.

progress_notes.resident_status: Resident stable and presenting with typical engaged demeanor today. Mood appears improved from yesterday.
progress_notes.observed_behaviors: Resident actively participated in morning groups. Volunteered to share first during process group and discussed his struggle with missing his girlfriend and outside life.
progress_notes.mood_affect: Resident reported mood as "better today." Affect was full range and congruent. Some underlying sadness when discussing relationship but overall brighter.
progress_notes.activity_participation: Attended all groups with active participation. Provided peer support to a newer resident who appeared anxious in group.
progress_notes.staff_interactions: Resident was friendly and engaged. Discussed housing plan goals with case manager during scheduled meeting.
progress_notes.peer_interactions: Active positive interactions. Observed encouraging new resident and showing him around the facility.
progress_notes.medication_compliance: N/A - no current medications.
progress_notes.meals_appetite: Appetite good. Ate all meals.
progress_notes.sleep_pattern: Resident reported sleeping approximately 6 hours. States he felt more rested today.
progress_notes.staff_interventions: Encouraged continued peer support behavior. Provided positive feedback for openness in group about difficult feelings.
progress_notes.resident_response: Resident stated it felt good to talk about his feelings in group. Receptive to positive feedback.
progress_notes.additional_notes: Resident showing growth in emotional expression and peer support. Continue current plan.

progress_notes.resident_status: Resident stable. Pleasant evening.
progress_notes.observed_behaviors: Resident exercised during outdoor time, then watched TV with peers. Appeared relaxed.
progress_notes.mood_affect: Mood stable.
progress_notes.activity_participation: N/A
progress_notes.staff_interactions: Cooperative and friendly.
progress_notes.peer_interactions: Positive interactions with peers during leisure time.
progress_notes.medication_compliance: N/A - no current medications.
progress_notes.meals_appetite: Accepted evening snack.
progress_notes.sleep_pattern: Resident asleep by 11 PM check. Asleep through all overnight checks with no disturbances noted.
progress_notes.staff_interventions: Routine monitoring and support.
progress_notes.resident_response: Cooperative.

progress_notes.resident_status: Resident is in early treatment (Day 5) and adjusting to the structured environment. Motivated for treatment and cooperative with programming. Reports strong cravings for alcohol.
progress_notes.observed_behaviors: Resident was observed pacing in the hallway between groups. Attended all programming and sat at the front of the room. Military bearing noted in posture and manner. Fidgeted with hands during discussion of cravings.
progress_notes.mood_affect: Resident reported mood as "determined but struggling." Affect was appropriate though some anxiety visible when discussing cravings.
progress_notes.activity_participation: Attended morning psychoeducation, relapse prevention group, and AA meeting. Participated actively and shared about his 40+ year drinking history. Stated he wants to "finally beat this."
progress_notes.staff_interactions: Resident was respectful and direct with staff. Uses formal communication style. Asked questions about the daily schedule and expectations.
progress_notes.peer_interactions: Limited but appropriate. Introduced himself to one peer at lunch. Tends to observe rather than engage socially.
progress_notes.medication_compliance: N/A - no current medications. Resident reconsidering psychiatric medications and agreed to discuss with prescriber again.
progress_notes.hygiene_adls: Independent with all hygiene. Room extremely organized and tidy (consistent with military background).
progress_notes.meals_appetite: Good appetite. Ate all of breakfast and lunch.
progress_notes.sleep_pattern: Resident reported sleeping approximately 3-4 hours with difficulty staying asleep. Reports PTSD-related nightmares about military service. Wakes up sweating.
progress_notes.staff_interventions: Provided craving management support and reviewed distraction techniques. Scheduled prescriber appointment to discuss sleep and anxiety medications.
progress_notes.resident_response: Resident was receptive to interventions. Stated he is "ready to do whatever it takes." Agreed to consider medications to help with sleep and cravings.
progress_notes.notable_events: Resident reported intense alcohol cravings (7/10) but utilized coping skills and did not display behavioral dysregulation. Safety maintained.
progress_notes.additional_notes: Continue monitoring cravings and sleep. Prescriber appointment scheduled for tomorrow. Veteran peer support resources may be beneficial.

progress_notes.resident_status: Resident stable. Quiet evening. Reports continued cravings but managing.
progress_notes.observed_behaviors: Resident spent evening reading a book in the common area. Occasionally paused and appeared lost in thought.
progress_notes.mood_affect: Mood subdued. Stated cravings are "still there but I'm handling it."
progress_notes.activity_participation: N/A
progress_notes.staff_interactions: Cooperative. Checked in with staff about cravings before bed.
progress_notes.peer_interactions: Minimal. Preferred solitude.
progress_notes.medication_compliance: N/A - no current medications.
progress_notes.hygiene_adls: Completed evening routine independently and thoroughly.
progress_notes.meals_appetite: Accepted evening snack.
progress_notes.sleep_pattern: Resident had significant difficulty sleeping. Observed awake at 11 PM, 1 AM, and 3 AM checks. Appeared to be resting but awake. Finally asleep at 5 AM check. Reports nightmares when he does fall asleep.
progress_notes.staff_interventions: Offered warm milk and relaxation techniques. Checked in with resident during overnight awakenings.
progress_notes.resident_response: Resident accepted support but stated nothing helps him sleep. "Been like this for years."
progress_notes.notable_events: Resident experienced poor sleep with PTSD-related insomnia.
progress_notes.additional_notes: Sleep significantly impaired. Prioritize medication discussion tomorrow.

progress_notes.resident_status: Resident presents fatigued due to poor sleep but remains motivated and engaged. Met with prescriber this morning and agreed to start medications.
progress_notes.observed_behaviors: Resident appeared tired with dark circles under eyes but attended all groups. Yawned frequently but maintained attention. Posture remained upright.
progress_notes.mood_affect: Resident reported mood as "tired but hopeful." Affect was somewhat blunted from fatigue but brightened when discussing medication plan.
progress_notes.activity_participation: Attended CBT group, trauma psychoeducation, and individual therapy. Engaged actively despite fatigue. Discussed PTSD triggers related to military service in therapy.
progress_notes.staff_interactions: Resident was cooperative and communicative. Expressed gratitude for staff support with medication decision.
progress_notes.peer_interactions: Had brief conversation with another male resident who is also a veteran. Appeared to connect over shared military background.
progress_notes.medication_compliance: Prescriber initiated psychiatric medications today including medication for cravings, mood, anxiety, sleep, and PTSD. Resident accepted willingly. AM dose administered.
progress_notes.meals_appetite: Appetite good. Ate all meals.
progress_notes.sleep_pattern: Resident reported sleeping only 2-3 hours. Looking forward to trying sleep medication tonight.
progress_notes.staff_interventions: Supported medication initiation. Provided psychoeducation on medication expectations and potential side effects. Connected resident with other veteran in milieu.
progress_notes.resident_response: Resident expressed hope that medications will help. Stated it was "good to talk to someone who understands" (referencing veteran peer).
progress_notes.notable_events: Psychiatric medications initiated per prescriber orders. Resident connected with peer who shares veteran background.
progress_notes.additional_notes: Monitor response to new medications. Encourage continued connection with veteran peer.

progress_notes.resident_status: Resident stable. First night on sleep and PTSD medications.
progress_notes.observed_behaviors: Resident spent evening in common area talking with veteran peer. Appeared more relaxed than previous evenings.
progress_notes.mood_affect: Mood improved. Less tension observed.
progress_notes.activity_participation: N/A - Engaged in peer interaction during leisure time.
progress_notes.staff_interactions: Cooperative during med pass. Asked appropriate questions about new medications.
progress_notes.peer_interactions: Extended conversation with veteran peer. Both appeared to benefit from connection.
progress_notes.medication_compliance: Evening medications administered per new MAR including sleep medication and PTSD nightmare medication. Resident accepted all medications.
progress_notes.meals_appetite: Accepted evening snack.
progress_notes.sleep_pattern: Resident fell asleep by 11 PM check. Remained asleep through 1 AM and 3 AM checks. Brief awakening noted at 4:30 AM (during routine check resident opened eyes) but quickly fell back asleep. Asleep at 5 AM check. Significant improvement from previous nights.
progress_notes.staff_interventions: Monitored response to new medications.
progress_notes.resident_response: Resident appeared to tolerate medications well with no adverse effects observed.
progress_notes.notable_events: First night on psychiatric medications with positive initial response - significantly improved sleep compared to previous nights.
progress_notes.additional_notes: Continue monitoring medication response. Positive outcome on first night.

progress_notes.resident_status: Resident presents with markedly improved mood and energy following better sleep. Reports feeling "like a new man."
progress_notes.observed_behaviors: Resident was alert and engaged during morning groups. Made eye contact, participated actively, and smiled appropriately. Significant difference from previous days when fatigued.
progress_notes.mood_affect: Resident reported mood as "good - best I've felt in a long time." Affect was bright and full range.
progress_notes.activity_participation: Attended all groups with active participation. Shared during AA meeting about starting medications and finally getting sleep. Offered encouragement to newer residents.
progress_notes.staff_interactions: Resident was friendly and talkative. Thanked multiple staff members for their support. Asked about VA services and housing resources.
progress_notes.peer_interactions: Continued connection with veteran peer. Also observed interacting with other residents more than previous days.
progress_notes.medication_compliance: AM medications administered per MAR. Resident accepted all medications and reported craving medication is "taking the edge off." Cravings reduced from 7/10 to 4/10.
progress_notes.meals_appetite: Excellent appetite. Ate all meals.
progress_notes.sleep_pattern: Resident reported sleeping approximately 6 hours with only one brief awakening. States he did not have nightmares for the first time in weeks.
progress_notes.staff_interventions: Provided positive reinforcement for progress. Connected with case manager to discuss VA resources.
progress_notes.resident_response: Resident was highly receptive and expressed gratitude. Stated he "finally has hope" that he can recover.
progress_notes.notable_events: Significant clinical improvement noted following medication initiation - improved sleep, reduced cravings, better mood and engagement.
progress_notes.additional_notes: Excellent response to treatment. Continue current medication regimen. Explore veteran-specific resources with case management.

progress_notes.resident_status: Resident stable with continued improvement. Positive evening.
progress_notes.observed_behaviors: Resident was observed socializing with peers during leisure time. Shared stories from his military career and peers appeared engaged. Laughed several times.
progress_notes.mood_affect: Mood stable and positive.
progress_notes.activity_participation: N/A - Active socialization during leisure time.
progress_notes.staff_interactions: Cooperative. Thanked staff for "giving him a chance."
progress_notes.peer_interactions: More socially engaged than any previous evening. Taking on informal mentor role with newer residents.
progress_notes.medication_compliance: Evening medications administered per MAR. Accepted all medications.
progress_notes.meals_appetite: Accepted evening snack.
progress_notes.sleep_pattern: Resident asleep by 10:45 PM (before official checks). Asleep and sleeping peacefully through all overnight checks. No restlessness or awakenings noted.
progress_notes.staff_interventions: Routine monitoring and support.
progress_notes.resident_response: Cooperative.
progress_notes.additional_notes: Continued positive response to treatment. Resident appears to be settling well into milieu and building peer connections.
